dashboard.label: Alerts And Saved Searches
dashboard.description: Packaged security-operations detections and supporting saved searches for the production investigation model.

html.p: This page highlights the packaged DefenseClaw Security Ops detection searches that sit on top of the `dcso_*` production support layer. The detection searches remain disabled by default, run on a 5-minute schedule with a 15-minute lookback when enabled, and intentionally stop at detect, explain, investigate, and recommend.

search.query: | makeresults count=8 | streamstats count as row | eval search_name=case( row=1, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Repeated Deny Activity", row=2, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Dangerous Command Or Tool Denied", row=3, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Policy Bypass Or Retry After Denial", row=4, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Stuck Or Retry-Storm Session", row=5, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Runtime Error Burst Around Risky Run", row=6, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - High-Cost Or Long-Duration Risky Run", row=7, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Latest Critical Investigations", row=8, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Top Risky Runs Sessions" ), purpose=case( row=1, "Detect repeated deny outcomes for the same run or session.", row=2, "Detect denied dangerous command or tool evidence.", row=3, "Detect bypass-like retry-after-deny behavior.", row=4, "Detect stuck sessions and retry storms.", row=5, "Detect repeated runtime errors around a risky run or session.", row=6, "Detect high-cost or long-duration risky investigations.", row=7, "Populate the command-center critical queue.", row=8, "Populate the command-center top risky queue." ), primary_family=case( row=1 OR row=2 OR row=3, "policy + runtime + diagnostics", row=4, "diagnostics", row=5, "runtime + diagnostics", row=6, "usage", row=7 OR row=8, "rolled-up investigations" ), default_state=case(row<=6, "disabled scheduled search", 1=1, "visible report search"), schedule=case(row<=6, "*/5 * * * * with last 15 minutes", 1=1, "on-demand"), target_surface=case(row<=6, "Runs And Sessions + Search And Drilldown", 1=1, "Overview") | table search_name purpose primary_family default_state schedule target_surface

| makeresults count=2 | streamstats count as row | eval search_name=case( row=1, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Latest Critical Investigations", row=2, "DefenseClaw Security Ops - Top Risky Runs Sessions" ), purpose=case( row=1, "Populate the command-center critical investigations queue.", row=2, "Populate the command-center priority queue across needs_review, risky, and critical." ), target_surface="Overview" | table search_name purpose target_surface
